name: suggy-sweep
description: Suggy Sweep — подготовка ПК к переустановке Windows

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "python backend/main.py" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,gui -c blue,green,magenta "python backend/main.py" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix electron"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron:main && npm run pack --prefix electron
